source_document.title: (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for
source_document.issuing_authority: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

notification.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
notification.context: Permits mutual funds to borrow funds for specific purposes and sets limits on borrowings.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: Exempts intraday borrowings from the 20% limit subject to conditions specified by the Board.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: Compliance with specific clauses of the SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996
regulation.context: This circular is issued in exercise of powers conferred under Section 11 (1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with the provisions of Regulation 77 of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996, to protect the interest of investors in securities and to promote the development of, and to regulate the securities market.

master_circular.title: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds
master_circular.context: Compliance with specific paragraph of the SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds.

master_circular.title: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds
master_circular.context: Cost of intraday borrowing and responsibility for losses or costs due to unforeseen events.

circular.title: Introduction of Closing Auction Session
circular.context: Introduction of the Closing Auction Session in the equity cash segment of the Stock Exchanges.
